title: lippia sandwithiana
intro: Lippia sandwithiana, also known as the 'Sandwith's Lippia', is a species of flowering plant in the verbena family (Verbenaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lippia sandwithiana include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in wound healing and as an antiseptic. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal medicine preparations to treat various ailments.
